The '''Vahaba asteroids''' were in the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]], near [[Halmad/Legends|Halmad]], along the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They were home to ore [[Miner/Legends|miners]] and skilled metal fabricators, who once had trade ties with [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. They were part of [[Zsinj]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and, in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], were the location of the beginning of the [[Battle of Selaggis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
